label: Boolean circuits & differentiable logic gates

node.label: Boolean circuits & differentiable logic gates
node.definition: Logical operations and soft relaxations implement exact rules, circuits, routing, and neuro-symbolic constraints.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Boolean circuits & differentiable logic gates is to connect Discrete mathematics & logic, Programs, ASTs, bytecode & intermediate representations to downstream capabilities including Expert systems, production rules & rule engines.
examples: substrate for Expert systems, production rules & rule engines
limitations: Its benefit depends on implementation, scale, data, and hardware; the same mechanism can add complexity without improving the target workload. Its direct dependencies include Discrete mathematics & logic, Programs, ASTs, bytecode & intermediate representations.

dependencies.rationale: Boolean circuits & differentiable logic gates uses Discrete mathematics & logic as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Boolean circuits & differentiable logic gates uses Programs, ASTs, bytecode & intermediate representations as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Boolean circuits & differentiable logic gates is assembled in part from the mechanism or model component Nonlinear activations.
